Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»TRIVIA: In which sport has South Africa won the most Olympic medals?

South Africa has won 89 medals in 11 different sports in the 20 Olympic Games the country has attended. Which sport has contributed the most?

South Africafirst participated at the1904Olympics GamesinSt. Louisin the United States and sent athletes to compete in every Olympics Games untilRomein 1960.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section

At that time, in response to South Africa’s policy of apartheid, Mzansiwas then barred from the Games.

After negotiations to end apartheid in the country commenced in 1990, South Africa re-joined the Olympic movement.

The South African Sports Confederation and Olympic Committee (Sascoc) was created in 1991 and South Africa returned to the Games at the 1992 Olympics in Barcelona.

In total, South Africa was excluded fromsevenOlympic Games’ during that period.

South Africa has competed at20Olympic Games to date.

South African athletes have won a total of89medals.

Those 89 medals comprise27golds,33silvers and29bronzes.

Those medals have come in11different sports, with athletics (28), swimming (20) and boxing (19) making the podium in terms of most medals won.

South Africa has struck gold insixof those 11 sports.

South Africa’s athletes will be looking to add to that tally at this year’sParis Olympicsfrom26 July to 11 August.
